_meta.source: BIR Revenue Regulations No. 11-2018 (as amended by TRAIN Law) — Semi-Monthly Compensation Level (SMCL) table, Annex E
_meta.authority: Republic Act No. 10963 (Tax Reform for Acceleration and Inclusion / TRAIN Law) — individual income tax brackets effective January 1, 2023 onwards (second phase of TRAIN rate reductions)
notes: Withholding tax is applied to TAXABLE INCOME, not gross compensation.

Bracket 'over' values are the LOWER exclusive bounds. At TI = bracket floor exactly, the worker stays in the previous bracket and pays the previous bracket's tax up to that point — which equals the next bracket's published 'base'. Math is continuous at boundaries.
Bracket bases (937.50, 4270.70, 16770.70, 91770.70) are the BIR-published semi-monthly cumulative tax values (annual ÷ 24).
